get.summary:
Export all (filtered) alternants to an Excel file.
Accepts the same name / start / end query params as the global view

Export all learners (apprenant + alternant + stagiaire) as an Excel file.
Columns: Promotion, Nom Prénom, Début contrat, Fin contrat,
         Hres formation (alternants), Hres alternance (alternants),
         Heures (non-alternants), Total
